node.statement: APPROX A6 (Finite-size extrapolation to thermodynamic limit): Compute Delta(N) for N=6,8,10. Fit: Delta(N) = Delta(inf) + a/N (2 parameters, 3 data points). Published extrapolated values: nu=1/3: Delta(inf)=0.1036 e^2/(eps*ell) [P04-Fano p.2678]; nu=1/5: Delta(inf)=0.0244 [P04-Fano Table VIII]. Fano fitting formula: E(nu) = -0.41167 - 0.18486/N - 0.27428/N^2 for nu=1/3 [P04-Fano p.2678]. NEGLECTED: N^{-3} and higher terms. [P04-Fano Sec IV p.2678; P15-HaldaneRezayi]
